column9: VP title (North Star). Mostly remote Bangalore. Post-IPO SG-listed (SGX Catalist Jan 2026, 31.9x oversubscribed), 47% rev growth. Strong AWS+Terraform+SRE match. 2 gates: (1) total comp >=75 LPA (base+equity; SGX shares now liquid); (2) confirm Bangalore on offer. High Confidence legitimacy.
